* add checker for data confirmed not

* change log

* fix index bug

* add tx detail info into the `GetBatchTransactionByDataStoreId` api

* add txdata to the eigen API

* finish sync service for syncing data from mt-batcher to da.

* add browser api to dtl

* finish api for broswer

* change metrics name for da sync service

* change mtbatcher-fetch-url from localhost to http://127.0.0.1

* change syncToDa to false

* fix http error

* fix several bugs

* finish local test

* delete log

---------

* resove conflicts again

* resove conflicts again again

* change mt-batcher and challege logic for dtl

---------

* dtl support upgrade for change ctc rollup to eigen (#750)

* Hotfix/ctc rollup switch to eigenlayer (#755)

* fix mt-batch point nil error

* modify batch-submitter continuous rollup problem

* fix build error in batchsubmitter/driver/sequencerDriver

* add two api for txs fetching and change the database instruction.

* dynamically fetch da node data from da network (#760)

* Feature/fixdtl (#767)

* dtl code bug fix and logic change

* change api error for transaction

* change go mod config

* fix dtl sync eigenda bug (#770)

* fix dtl bug for api (#772)

* dtl da init bug fix (#774)

* fix dtl sync eigenlayer step bug (#775)
